hero.headline: A gallery of voices, visions, and creative work.
hero.subheading: The Gallery showcases digital art, media projects, stories, and cultural expression emerging from the World Class Scholars ecosystem.

intro.heading: Creativity as evidence of learning.
intro.body: Every artwork, recording, design, or reflection tells a story about how people see themselves and the world around them. The Gallery is a place to celebrate that process, highlight emerging voices, and give creativity the public space it deserves.
